ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the customer belongs to */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the customer's location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's location */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the customer was created */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer belongs to */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the customer's company */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the customer's company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales team */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team lead */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the sales team is responsible for */,
  "quota" REAL /* Sales quota for the sales team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_teams_team_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales team */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sales team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales territory */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales team assigned to the territory */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the sales territory is in */,
  "quota" REAL /* Sales quota for the sales territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territories_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales activity */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales team */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of sales activity (e.g., phone call, meeting, email) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the sales activity occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales activity */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the sales activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_activities_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_activities_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales performance metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales team */,
  "sales_revenue" REAL /* Sales revenue generated by the sales team */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the sales team */,
  "pipeline_growth" REAL /* Pipeline growth rate of the sales team */,
  "quota_attainment" REAL /* Quota attainment of the sales team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, team lead, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that triggered the log (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territory_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory assignment */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the territory */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales team */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the territory was assigned */,
  "quota" REAL /* Sales quota for the territory assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territory_assignments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territory_assignments_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer note */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the customer */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_notes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales forecast */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales team */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Value of the forecast */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecasts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("team_id")
)
